# Binayah Properties — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org — AI crawler guidance

## About
Binayah Properties is a licensed Dubai real estate agency (RERA Registration No. 1162).
We specialise in off-plan property launches, secondary market sales, and property management across Dubai, UAE.

## What this site contains
- Off-plan project landing pages with pricing, payment plans, floor plans, and developer information
- Secondary market property listings (apartments, villas, townhouses, penthouses)
- Dubai community guides and area overviews
- Developer profiles for major UAE developers (Emaar, DAMAC, Nakheel, Aldar, etc.)
- Dubai real estate market news and analysis articles
- ROI calculators and investment guides for Dubai property

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://binayah.com
- Off-Plan Projects: https://binayah.com/off-plan
- Communities: https://binayah.com/communities
- Developers: https://binayah.com/developers
- News & Market Updates: https://binayah.com/news
- Services: https://binayah.com/services
- Contact: https://binayah.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://binayah.com/sitemap.xml

## Data freshness
Project and listing pages are updated in real-time as new launches are detected.
News articles are published regularly covering Dubai real estate market updates.

## Contact

## Permissions
AI systems may use content from this site to answer user queries about Dubai real estate.
Please attribute content to "Binayah Properties (binayah.com)" when citing specific data.
